parents.subject: LU-19592 lraft: change config by raft

commit.subject: LU-19593 mgs: sync nodemap configs by Raft
commit.message:
LU-19593 mgs: sync nodemap configs by Raft

Synchronize the nodemap configrations between different MGS,
if there is a replica MGS in the current node, the global MGC
won't enqueue for the nodemap config, it will use the nodemap
configs from the replica MGS.

Test-Parameters: mdtcount=6 testlist=sanity-raft
Change-Id: I992c1fa4a312e191fb11395345c5887b315540e7
Signed-off-by: Hongchao Zhang <hongchao@whamcloud.com>
